title: premna tenii
intro: Premna tenii is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Indian bay leaf or black pepper tree. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Premna tenii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Premna tenii is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
